winning_test.source:
import pytest

from gradebook.analytics import letter_grade


def test_score_89_is_b_not_a():
    assert letter_grade(89) == "B"
winning_test.targeted_behavior: At the exact A/B boundary, a score of 89 remains a B; only scores of 90 or higher are A.
